hook: Your next raise is a new client.
caption:
Your next raise is a new client.

Inside a full-time role, income grows on someone else's schedule. Budget cycles. Performance windows. A manager fighting for your number in a room you're not in.

In a portfolio career, you control the lever. Add a relationship. Add income. The approval cycle is just you deciding.

This isn't about going solo and hoping. It's math. One $3K/month retainer beats a 4% raise on $80K — every single year.

The multi-client future isn't coming. It's already here, for the people who stopped waiting for a review and started building a roster.
